implementation_notes: Implemented both agent factory files exactly as specified. agents/player.py uses FilesystemBackend(root_dir='.') and imports search_data and write_output from the tools package. agents/coach.py uses no backend argument (defaults to StateBackend) and passes an empty tools list. Both factories accept model and domain_prompt parameters and concatenate the base system prompt with the domain_prompt. Neither module instantiates an agent at module level. Tests mock create_deep_agent and FilesystemBackend to avoid LLM credentials, and verify all required arguments including the absence of backend= in the coach call and the absence of FilesystemBackend in the coach module's namespace.
requirements_addressed: agents/player.py created with create_player(model, domain_prompt) factory
agents/coach.py created with create_coach(model, domain_prompt) factory
Coach does NOT specify backend= argument
Both accept model and domain_prompt parameters (not subject_prompt)
No agent instantiated at module level
No references to rag_retrieval, jsonl_writer, subject_prompt, curriculum
Player imports search_data and write_output from tools package
prompts/ and tools/ files left untouched
